patterns.description: Features deprecated or removed in RHEL 10 across multiple subsystems (storage, networking, filesystem)

verification_queries.context: Verify GFS2 and Resilient Storage deprecation status in RHEL 10
Verify DHCP deprecation and recommended alternatives in RHEL 10
Verify filesystem-related deprecations in RHEL 10

verification_queries.query: RHEL 10 release notes deprecated removed features
verification_queries.context: Comprehensive list of deprecated/removed features in RHEL 10

patterns.description: Support questions related to end-of-life RHEL versions (6, 7) including lifecycle queries and upgrade compatibility concerns
patterns.version_pattern: EOL RHEL versions (6, 7); subset includes multi-major version upgrade scenarios (6→9 spanning 3 major versions)

verification_queries.query: RHEL 6 end of life date extended lifecycle support
verification_queries.context: Verify EOL status and available support options for RHEL 6

verification_queries.query: RHEL 7 end of life date extended lifecycle support
verification_queries.context: Verify EOL status and available extended support for RHEL 7

verification_queries.query: RHEL 6 to RHEL 9 container compatibility upgrade
verification_queries.context: Verify container compatibility and migration path when upgrading across multiple major versions (6→9)
Verify general container support policies for EOL RHEL versions

patterns.description: Authentication and security configuration issues across IdM, RBAC, and identity management

verification_queries.context: Identity management and RBAC setup
Security validation and networking authentication

patterns.description: Missing or unclear documentation across multiple RHEL features and components

verification_queries.context: Documentation gaps for virtualization, packages, system-roles, bootc, containers
Verify documentation coverage for newer features

patterns.description: CLI tool functionality and usability issues across various command-line utilities

verification_queries.context: CLI locale issues with insights-client and other tools
Usage documentation for roxctl, insights-client, lightspeed CLI

patterns.description: Unsupported container platform configurations including OpenShift, container images, and containerization technologies

verification_queries.context: Verify supported container platforms, OpenShift versions, and container image requirements

verification_queries.query: OpenShift Security Context Constraints SCC requirements
verification_queries.context: Validate supported SCC configurations for RHEL containers in OpenShift
Check supported container images and virtualization configurations

patterns.description: Unsupported security policy and configuration settings across cloud, container, and OS-level security mechanisms

verification_queries.query: RHEL SELinux supported policies and modes
verification_queries.context: Verify supported SELinux configurations and custom policy requirements

verification_queries.query: RHEL AWS cloud security best practices
verification_queries.context: Validate supported AWS security configurations for RHEL instances

verification_queries.query: OpenShift SCC security context constraints supported settings
verification_queries.context: Check supported security context constraints in container environments

patterns.description: Incorrect procedures for bootloader, GRUB, UEFI, and firmware operations across multiple RHEL versions

verification_queries.context: Verify correct GRUB configuration procedures across RHEL versions
Confirm proper UEFI and firmware update procedures
Validate boot-related troubleshooting steps

patterns.description: Incorrect procedures for rpm-ostree operations including kernel and package management

verification_queries.context: Verify correct rpm-ostree package layering and management procedures
Confirm proper kernel update procedures in rpm-ostree systems
Validate image-mode system administration procedures

patterns.description: Incorrect procedures for Pacemaker clustering and pcs management

verification_queries.context: Verify correct Pacemaker cluster setup and management procedures
Confirm proper pcs command usage for cluster management
Validate high availability clustering procedures

patterns.description: Incorrect procedures for Satellite server operations including authentication, registration, and capsule management

verification_queries.context: Verify correct Satellite registration and subscription-manager procedures
Confirm proper Capsule server management procedures
Validate hammer CLI command procedures for Satellite

patterns.description: Incorrect procedures for networking configuration including drivers and nmcli operations

verification_queries.context: Verify correct nmcli command usage for network configuration
Confirm proper network driver configuration procedures
Validate network configuration and troubleshooting procedures
